mapper.select: SELECT inchikey as id, COALESCE(molecular_formula, inchikey) as label FROM tcm_compounds WHERE inchikey = #{inchikey}
SELECT DISTINCT c.inchikey as id, COALESCE(c.compound_name, c.inchikey) as label FROM herb_compound_rel hc INNER JOIN tcm_compounds c ON hc.inchikey = c.inchikey WHERE hc.tcm_herb_id = #{herbId}
SELECT DISTINCT d.disease_id as id, d.disease_name as label FROM herb_disease_rel hd INNER JOIN diseases d ON hd.disease_id = d.disease_id WHERE hd.tcm_herb_id = #{herbId}
SELECT DISTINCT s.tcm_syndrome_id as id, s.syndrome_name_zh as label FROM herb_syndrome_rel hs INNER JOIN tcm_syndromes s ON hs.tcm_syndrome_id = s.tcm_syndrome_id WHERE hs.tcm_herb_id = #{herbId}
SELECT DISTINCT sy.tcm_symptom_id as id, sy.symptom_name_zh as label FROM herb_symptom_rel hs INNER JOIN tcm_symptoms sy ON hs.tcm_symptom_id = sy.tcm_symptom_id WHERE hs.tcm_herb_id = #{herbId}

SELECT p.tcm_prescription_id as id, p.name_zh as label FROM prescription_core_herb_rel pc INNER JOIN tcm_prescriptions p ON pc.tcm_prescription_id = p.tcm_prescription_id WHERE pc.tcm_herb_id = #{herbId}

SELECT DISTINCT h.tcm_herb_id as id, h.herb_name_zh as label FROM prescription_core_herb_rel pc INNER JOIN core_tcm_herbs h ON pc.tcm_herb_id = h.tcm_herb_id WHERE pc.tcm_prescription_id = #{prescriptionId}
SELECT DISTINCT d.disease_id as id, d.disease_name as label FROM prescription_disease_rel pd INNER JOIN diseases d ON pd.disease_id = d.disease_id WHERE pd.tcm_prescription_id = #{prescriptionId}

SELECT DISTINCT s.tcm_syndrome_id as id, s.syndrome_name_zh as label FROM prescription_syndrome_rel ps INNER JOIN tcm_syndromes s ON ps.tcm_syndrome_id = s.tcm_syndrome_id WHERE ps.tcm_prescription_id = #{prescriptionId}

SELECT DISTINCT sy.tcm_symptom_id as id, sy.symptom_name_zh as label FROM prescription_symptom_rel ps INNER JOIN tcm_symptoms sy ON ps.tcm_symptom_id = sy.tcm_symptom_id WHERE ps.tcm_prescription_id = #{prescriptionId}
SELECT DISTINCT h.tcm_herb_id as id, h.herb_name_zh as label FROM herb_compound_rel hc INNER JOIN core_tcm_herbs h ON hc.tcm_herb_id = h.tcm_herb_id WHERE hc.inchikey = #{inchikey}
SELECT DISTINCT t.tcm_tar_id as id, t.symbol as label FROM compound_target_rel ct INNER JOIN targets t ON ct.tcm_tar_id = t.tcm_tar_id WHERE ct.inchikey = #{inchikey}
SELECT DISTINCT c.inchikey as id, COALESCE(c.molecular_formula, c.inchikey) as label FROM compound_target_rel ct INNER JOIN tcm_compounds c ON ct.inchikey = c.inchikey WHERE ct.tcm_tar_id = #{geneId}
SELECT DISTINCT d.disease_id as id, d.disease_name as label FROM disease_gene_rel dg INNER JOIN diseases d ON dg.disease_id = d.disease_id WHERE dg.tcm_tar_id = #{geneId}
SELECT DISTINCT s.tcm_syndrome_id as id, s.syndrome_name_zh as label FROM syndrome_gene_rel sg INNER JOIN tcm_syndromes s ON sg.tcm_syndrome_id = s.tcm_syndrome_id WHERE sg.tcm_tar_id = #{geneId}
SELECT DISTINCT p.pathway_id as id, p.name as label FROM pathway_target_rel pt INNER JOIN pathways p ON pt.pathway_id = p.pathway_id WHERE pt.tcm_tar_id = #{geneId}
SELECT DISTINCT ph.phenotype_id as id, ph.phenotype_name as label FROM phenotype_target_rel pt INNER JOIN phenotypes ph ON pt.phenotype_id = ph.phenotype_id WHERE pt.tcm_tar_id = #{geneId}
SELECT DISTINCT t.tcm_tar_id as id, t.symbol as label FROM disease_gene_rel dg INNER JOIN targets t ON dg.tcm_tar_id = t.tcm_tar_id WHERE dg.disease_id = #{diseaseId}
SELECT DISTINCT h.tcm_herb_id as id, h.herb_name_zh as label FROM herb_disease_rel hd INNER JOIN core_tcm_herbs h ON hd.tcm_herb_id = h.tcm_herb_id WHERE hd.disease_id = #{diseaseId}

SELECT DISTINCT s.tcm_syndrome_id as id, s.syndrome_name_zh as label FROM prescription_disease_rel pd INNER JOIN prescription_syndrome_rel ps ON pd.tcm_prescription_id = ps.tcm_prescription_id INNER JOIN tcm_syndromes s ON ps.tcm_syndrome_id = s.tcm_syndrome_id WHERE pd.disease_id = #{diseaseId}

SELECT DISTINCT p.tcm_prescription_id as id, p.name_zh as label FROM prescription_symptom_rel ps INNER JOIN tcm_prescriptions p ON ps.tcm_prescription_id = p.tcm_prescription_id WHERE ps.tcm_symptom_id = #{symptomId}
SELECT DISTINCT h.tcm_herb_id as id, h.herb_name_zh as label FROM herb_symptom_rel hs INNER JOIN core_tcm_herbs h ON hs.tcm_herb_id = h.tcm_herb_id WHERE hs.tcm_symptom_id = #{symptomId}

SELECT DISTINCT s.tcm_syndrome_id as id, s.syndrome_name_zh as label FROM syndrome_symptom_rel ss INNER JOIN tcm_syndromes s ON ss.tcm_syndrome_id = s.tcm_syndrome_id WHERE ss.tcm_symptom_id = #{symptomId}
SELECT DISTINCT w.wm_symptom_id as id, w.symptom_name as label FROM tcm_wm_symptom_rel tws INNER JOIN wm_symptoms w ON tws.wm_symptom_id = w.wm_symptom_id WHERE tws.tcm_symptom_id = #{symptomId}

SELECT DISTINCT p.tcm_prescription_id as id, p.name_zh as label FROM prescription_syndrome_rel ps INNER JOIN tcm_prescriptions p ON ps.tcm_prescription_id = p.tcm_prescription_id WHERE ps.tcm_syndrome_id = #{syndromeId}

SELECT DISTINCT s.tcm_symptom_id as id, s.symptom_name_zh as label FROM syndrome_symptom_rel ss INNER JOIN tcm_symptoms s ON ss.tcm_symptom_id = s.tcm_symptom_id WHERE ss.tcm_syndrome_id = #{syndromeId}
SELECT DISTINCT h.tcm_herb_id as id, h.herb_name_zh as label FROM herb_syndrome_rel hs INNER JOIN core_tcm_herbs h ON hs.tcm_herb_id = h.tcm_herb_id WHERE hs.tcm_syndrome_id = #{syndromeId}
SELECT DISTINCT t.tcm_tar_id as id, t.symbol as label FROM syndrome_gene_rel sg INNER JOIN targets t ON sg.tcm_tar_id = t.tcm_tar_id WHERE sg.tcm_syndrome_id = #{syndromeId}

SELECT DISTINCT t.tcm_symptom_id as id, t.symptom_name_zh as label FROM tcm_wm_symptom_rel tws INNER JOIN tcm_symptoms t ON tws.tcm_symptom_id = t.tcm_symptom_id WHERE tws.wm_symptom_id = #{wmSymptomId}
SELECT DISTINCT t.tcm_tar_id as id, t.symbol as label FROM wm_symptom_gene_rel wsg INNER JOIN targets t ON wsg.tcm_tar_id = t.tcm_tar_id WHERE wsg.wm_symptom_id = #{wmSymptomId}

SELECT inchikey as id, COALESCE(molecular_formula, inchikey) as name, CAST(molecular_weight AS CHAR) as extra FROM tcm_compounds WHERE inchikey LIKE #{keyword} OR molecular_formula LIKE #{keyword} ORDER BY molecular_weight LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
